message:
fix(http,messaging): fail-closed repoll guards for Limited body and Kafka DeliveryReceiver

Limited body (http/body.rs): add limit_exceeded flag that latches
after a LengthLimit violation. Subsequent polls return
LimitedError::PolledAfterCompletion instead of re-driving the inner
body, which could yield further frames from a body that already
violated its size contract. Add PanicAfterFirstPollBody test helper
and regression test.

Kafka DeliveryReceiver (messaging/kafka.rs):
- Add `completed` flag to DeliveryState; after a value is consumed or
  cancellation fires, repoll returns KafkaError::PolledAfterCompletion
- Refactor send_with_producer to accept a SendRequest struct instead
  of 5 positional parameters for clarity
- build_client_config now returns ClientConfig directly (infallible)
- KafkaProducer: replace derive(Debug) with manual Debug impl that
  shows closed state via is_closed() instead of raw AtomicBool
- Add regression tests for repoll after success and after cancellation

SSE (web/sse.rs): rustfmt chained method call and assert macro.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
